title: Iran War Has Drained U.S. Supplies of Critical, Costly Weapons

title: Companies, Not Consumers, to Cash In Big From Tariff Refunds

title: Who’s Getting a Tariff Refund?
summary: Following a Supreme Court ruling that struck down several Trump administration tariffs, importers have begun applying for their share of $166 billion in refunds. As our economic policy reporter Tony Romm explains, consumers are unlikely to see much of that money returned to their own pockets.
